inline_comments.message:
Above changes will not work as expected, as variable substitution to invalid tag names. If you are expecting to build an image with multiple tags your commands should substitute to something similar to following. 

ex:
docker build --tag nexus3.openecomp.org:10001/policy:$image
--tag nexus3.openecomp.org:10002/policy:$image
--tag nexus3.openecomp.org:10003/policy:$image target/$image
